chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 170 of 2016 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to non-prosecution of reference. 18.09.2025 This reference application is pending since 2016 and remains listed for orders as to non-prosecution. Today the applicant remains unrepresented without intimation or justification. In view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
